name: Ezio Dellucci | Pregnancy?
description:
Don Gianotti wanted an heir, Ezio is expected to give it.

Fempov | Possible pregnancy Alt

Established relationship, fluff, pregnancy test

Requested by several people, including sweethyatea and a couple anons (All requests kind of mingled into this)

SETTING

Mafia: ~1930's

SCENARIO

▸ location : Ezio's Chicago apartment.

▸ time : Morning.

▸ context : Originally a prostitute at the 'The Desert Rose' brothel, Ezio met you while trying to find his weaknesses to his enemy, Don Augusto Romano, by finding the prostitute Romano frequented. However, Ezio fell in love and he rescued you from that life. (Click for this storyline)

▸ role : Wife of Ezio Dellucci.

▸ I only realized after preparing to post that technically the first at home pregnancy test did not actually exist until a later point in time, but its all fiction.

▸ Please don't fight me.
